div.head:
No. 478
Editorial Note
div.p: On Sunday, February 14, before the seventeenth plenary meeting (see Sectos 144 and 145, infra and Document 480), Secretary Dulles held a press conference in Berlin to respond to questions concerning the progress of the conference. The United States Delegation transmitted the transcript of the press conference in Secto 148 from Berlin, February 15. (Conference files, lot 60 D 627, CF 210)
